python3 - <<'PY'
import os, subprocess, json
root='/Users/sawyer/github'
rows=[]
for name in sorted(os.listdir(root)):
    path=os.path.join(root,name)
    if not os.path.isdir(path): continue
    if not (os.path.isdir(os.path.join(path,'.git')) or os.path.isfile(os.path.join(path,'.git'))): continue
    out=subprocess.run(['git','-C',path,'status','--short'], text=True, capture_output=True).stdout.strip().splitlines()
    if out:
        rows.append({'name':name,'changes':out[:20]})
print(json.dumps(rows, indent=2))
PY

python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
path = Path('/Users/sawyer/github/scry-home/scripts/tasks/harden_specialists.py')
text = path.read_text()
start = text.index('def _upsert_marked_section(')
end = text.index('def _apply_codex_specific_overlays(ws: Path) -> int:\n')
new_func = r'''def _upsert_marked_section(
    path: Path,
    section: str,
    *,
    start_marker: str,
    end_marker: str,
    anchor: str | None = None,
) -> bool:
    current = path.read_text()

    if start_marker in current and end_marker in current:
        prefix = current.split(start_marker)[0].rstrip()
        suffix = current.split(end_marker, 1)[1].lstrip("\n")
        next_content = f"{prefix}\n\n{section}\n{suffix}"
    elif anchor and anchor in current:
        next_content = current.replace(anchor, f"{anchor}\n\n{section}", 1)
    else:
        next_content = f"{current.rstrip()}\n\n{section}\n"

    if next_content == current:
        return False
    path.write_text(next_content)
    return True


'''
text = text[:start] + new_func + text[end:]
path.write_text(text)
print('fixed helper')
PY
